chewbbaca_fixture.label: chewBBACA fixture smoke
chewbbaca_fixture.notes: Requires CHEWIE_BIN and BLAST_BIN_DIR to point to a working chewBBACA+BLAST installation.

mentalist_docker.label: MentaLiST Docker smoke
